channel.title: Extra pages, failed experiments, etc. on d3adb5's personal website
channel.description: Recent content in Extra pages, failed experiments, etc. on d3adb5's personal website

item.title: Impossible, until it's done
item.description: This is a list of challenges and goals I’ve set for myself, to be updated and documented as I live my life. The concept is supposed to follow what Joel Runyon called an impossible list. I came across the concept from someone’s personal website, but have since forgotten where. If you care about me at all, grill me about updating this list if you can. Professional Acquire my first professional IT certification.
